summary: Backend-only validation completed for Paw CLI monorepo scope. Portable harness CLI works on linux-arm64, targeted vitest suites pass, MiniMax-M3 metadata is correct, and repository build succeeds with Node 22.19.
action_items: No blocking defects found in tested scope.
Optional: keep generated-model snapshot pinned during CI if external model catalogs change frequently.
critical_code_review_comments: packages/ai/src/models.generated.ts is very large (17k+ lines). This is generated output, but maintainability/debuggability risk remains if manually inspected frequently.
packages/ai/scripts/generate-models.ts is very large (2k+ lines); consider modularization to reduce change-risk in future provider metadata updates.
seed_data_creation: Created temporary harness.db records via harness-cli intake/trace during validation; then reverted harness.db to avoid persisting test data.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Executed with npx node@22.19.0 in /app/Paw. Commands validated: scripts/bin/harness-cli --version/init/query stats/query matrix --numeric/intake/trace, vitest for minimax-m3 + paw-build-command + paw-cli-e2e-validation, and npx node@22.19.0 --run build. All passed.
rca of the issue: No functional failures reproduced in requested scope. Root-cause target (Exec format error on unsupported prebuilt binary) appears mitigated by scripts/bin/harness-cli shell wrapper fallback to Node 22.19 via npx.
